items.title: The Unitree GD01 Is a Giant Mecha Robot You Can Actually Buy
items.summary: China’s Unitree, famous for making low-cost dancing robots, will now sell you a giant, wall-smashing mecha.

items.title: Foxconn Ransomware Attack Shows Nothing Is Safe Forever
items.summary: Famous for helping build Apple’s iPhones, Foxconn just suffered another cyberattack, highlighting the perils of warehousing some of the world’s most valuable data.

items.title: MAHA Keeps Being Weird as Hell About Fertility
items.summary: RFK Jr. and Mehmet Oz’s comments about teen sperm count and “underbabied” Americans at a recent women’s health event underscore the White House’s pronatalist agenda.

items.title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
items.summary: Early-stage venture firm A* Capital just took the wraps off its $450 million Fund III.

items.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
items.summary: Sadi Thermal Machines is Drew Baglino's second startup since leaving Tesla in 2024.

items.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
items.summary: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

items.title: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.summary: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.

items.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

items.title: Lebanon says two paramedics among 13 killed in Israeli strikes
items.summary: Lebanon's health ministry says the paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh in response to an earlier attack that killed one person.

items.title: Traders believe inflation could near 5% this year
items.summary: Prediction market traders see two-in-three odds that inflation will go above 4.5% this year, and nearly 40% odds that prices will accelerate above 5%.

items.title: Trump is taking more than a dozen U.S. executives to China. Jensen Huang isn't one of them
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang isn't going on Trump’s China trip, though more than a dozen other U.S. executives are.

items.title: Five things to watch in Asia as Trump prepares to meet China's Xi this week
items.summary: The U.S. and Chinese presidents are scheduled to gather in Beijing on Thursday and Friday amid a packed week of diplomatic meetings.

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

items.title: Trump installs his fourth acting FEMA chief after tapping full-time nominee
items.summary: Karen Evans, the acting head of the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), has departed the disaster relief agency in yet another leadership upheaval. A memo to FEMA staff on Tuesday disclosed that Evans was departing, according to Politico’s E&E News. Evans had been in charge of FEMA since December, after David Richardson, her predecessor as…

items.title: Marty Makary’s tenure as head of FDA ends with ‘difficulty’
items.summary: Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Commissioner Marty Makary stepped down on Tuesday, capping weeks of pressure and rumors that his job was in jeopardy.   The agency’s top food regulator, Kyle Diamantas, will take over, President Trump wrote on Truth Social.  Trump told reporters ahead of his trip to China on Tuesday that Makary had been “having some difficulty” in the role. …

items.title: South Carolina Republicans decline to consider redistricting in blow to Trump
items.summary: South Carolina’s Senate on Monday declined to extend its legislative calendar to consider drawing new GOP-favored congressional lines, dealing a blow to President Trump before the midterms this fall. The measure failed via a 29-17 vote after Trump on Monday urged Republicans to back the extension. “South Carolina Republicans: BE BOLD AND COURAGEOUS, just like…

items.title: BofA drops blunt warning about Fed rate cuts
items.summary: BofA drops blunt warning about Fed rate cuts

items.title: KeyBanc Raises its Price Target on Microchip Technology (MCHP) to $135
items.summary: KeyBanc Raises its Price Target on Microchip Technology (MCHP) to $135

items.title: Roth Capital Raises its Price Target on ON Semiconductor (ON) to $125
items.summary: Roth Capital Raises its Price Target on ON Semiconductor (ON) to $125

items.title: Scientists say this algae could remove microplastics from drinking water
items.summary: Researchers created a special kind of algae that can grab microscopic plastic pollution out of water almost like a magnet. The algae produce limonene, an orange-scented oil that helps them bind to water-repelling microplastics, forming easy-to-remove clumps. As a bonus, the algae also clean wastewater while growing.

items.title: This strange giant dinosaur may change what we know about Jurassic titans
items.summary: A bizarre new giant dinosaur discovered in Argentina is giving paleontologists a fresh look at how Jurassic titans evolved in the Southern Hemisphere. Bicharracosaurus dionidei stretched about 20 meters long and carried a strange mix of features seen in both Diplodocus and Brachiosaurus relatives. Scientists believe it could represent the first known Jurassic brachiosaurid from South America, helping fill a major gap in the dinosaur fossil record.

items.title: NASA’s Hubble  reveals a giant chaotic planet nursery unlike anything seen before
items.summary: Hubble has revealed a giant planet-forming disk unlike anything astronomers have seen before. Nicknamed “Dracula’s Chivito,” the enormous structure appears turbulent and oddly lopsided, with towering filaments visible on only one side. The disk contains enough material to potentially create multiple giant planets, making it a fascinating new laboratory for studying how planetary systems are born.

items.title: Jazz and classical music have become simpler, a new study finds
items.summary: Mathematical analysis suggests that melodies and harmonies have become less complex as music evolves and musicians find new ways “to create great music.”

items.title: Uterus transplants can provide a path to pregnancy and parenthood
items.summary: Donated uteruses transplanted into women without a womb can allow for successful pregnancy and birth.

items.title: Astronomers may have found a record-breaking pair of black holes
items.summary: At some 60 billion times the mass of the sun, this dark void could be home to a pair of black holes that are due for a cosmic collision.
